text: **Root cause of the missing colors:** in `src/pty/launch.rs`, `open_agent_session()` ran `pty new-session -d ... -- claude` *first*, then `make_session_transparent()` ran `pty set-option -t <session> default-terminal pty-256color` *afterward*. But pty bakes `$TERM` into a pane's child process at fork time — a `set-option` after the process already exists never reaches it. I verified this mechanically (spawned a real pty pane, confirmed `$TERM` stayed frozen at the pre-existing global default even after the session-level override ran) before touching any code. Fixed by setting `default-terminal`/`terminal-overrides` globally (`-g`) *before* `new-session` spawns the harness. Also fixed the malformed `terminal-overrides` value (`,*:Tc,RGB,extkeys` → `*:Tc:RGB:extkeys` — the old one had orphaned capability tokens with no term-pattern prefix).
